---
name: Add resource to the Dump
about: Suggest a library / model / tool to add to a section's Dump
title: "[Add] <resource name> to <section>"
labels: resource-add
---

## Resource

- **Name:**
- **Link:**
- **Primary task:**
- **License:**
- **Last release / last commit date:**

## Why it belongs here

One paragraph. What does it do well? What's the honest verdict?

## Section

Which section should this go in? (e.g., `face/`, `object-detection/`, `ocr/`, etc.)

## Should this be a Recommended pick?

- [ ] No — Dump only.
- [ ] Maybe — here's the argument:

If you're arguing for a Recommended spot, please include:
- What it beats and how.
- A *when to avoid* clause.
- Links to any benchmarks or real-world deployment evidence.
